policies.inbound:
<set-variable name="userText" value="@{
      var body = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
      var msgs = body["messages"] as JArray;
      if (msgs == null || msgs.Count == 0) { return ""; }
      return (string)(msgs.Last["content"] ?? "");
    }" />

    
      
        
        
          {{pii-sidecar-url}}
          POST
          
            application/json
          
          @{
            return new JObject(
              new JProperty("text", (string)context.Variables["userText"]),
              new JProperty("policy_profile", "strict"),
              new JProperty("scan_stage", "input")
            ).ToString();
          }
        

        
        
          
            
              
            
          
        

        <set-variable name="piiBody" value="@(((IResponse)context.Variables["piiResp"]).Body.As())" />

        
        
          
            
              
              {"error":"high-risk PII detected"}
            
          
        

        
        @{
          var body = context.Request.Body.As(preserveContent: true);
          var piiBody = (JObject)context.Variables["piiBody"];
          var masked = (string)piiBody["masked_text"];
          var msgs = body["messages"] as JArray;
          if (masked != null && msgs != null && msgs.Count > 0) {
            ((JObject)msgs.Last)["content"] = masked;
          }
          return body.ToString();
        }
